summary: High‑energy Iowa field house show with standout Dark Star and Eyes of the World; a close‑to‑stage matrix recording captures the PA/stage blend beautifully.
review: The performance is praised for its raw edge and soaring moments – Dark Star, Eyes of the World, Stagger Lee, Bertha and several other gems are highlighted as exceptional. The recording, taken very near the stage, blends PA and on‑stage sound into a clear, lively matrix capture that lets listeners feel the concert’s intensity.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers are enthusiastic (average 4.75★); musical comments emphasize many standout songs, while recording remarks note a very good close‑to‑stage matrix source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very close to the stage; captures an interesting mix of PA and on‑stage sound with overall clear, lively audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe a high‑energy, well‑balanced set with strong first‑set numbers and a consistently powerful vibe throughout the concert.
